case_title: TWO JINN, INC. DBA ALADDIN BAIL BONDS VS. KATHERINE FLORES ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-23-2021 CONTINUED TO JAN-25-2022 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
